creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
I personal rather to improvement on 2.6.x instead of 2.7.x for now. The  
2.7.x is a bit buggy. It breaks PHP, XML serialisation (HTML tree) and  
possible more. You can read in mailing list archive. I think the 2.7.x is  
young to be in ports tree, so let's wait for 2.7.2 or later.

Cheers,
Mezz
